moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Final Day
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Men's Singles Final takes place today, Sunday July 12, with world No. 1 Jannik Sinner defending his title against Alexander Zverev at 4pm.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's the biggest day in grass court tennis! Who are you backing in the Wimbledon Men's Final today, Sinner or Zverev? Tune in from 4pm! #Wimbledon

angles.name: Finals Day Excitement
angles.copy: Centre Court is ready for the ultimate showdown! The Wimbledon Men's Final is LIVE this afternoon. Get the Pimm's ready!

angles.name: Head-to-Head
angles.copy: Sinner vs Zverev, a blockbuster final! World number one against the French Open champion. Who lifts the trophy at Wimbledon today?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins its tournament days from Thursday, July 16, running until July 19, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport.

angles.name: Tournament Start
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's biggest test! The Open Championship officially gets underway on Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is set to host The Open Championship for the 11th time this week. A legendary course for a legendary tournament! #Golf

angles.name: Major Golf Week
angles.copy: From Thursday, all eyes are on Southport for The Open! The final major of the year is always unmissable. Don't miss a swing.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final Nears
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is reaching its climax, with the final match scheduled for Sunday, July 19, in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just a week away! The FIFA World Cup Final kicks off next Sunday. Who will be there?

angles.name: Semi-Final Buzz
angles.copy: With the World Cup semi-finals wrapping up, the excitement for next Sunday's final is building! Who do you want to see battle for the trophy?

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: From June 11th, to the final on July 19th - it's been an incredible World Cup! Who has been your player of the tournament so far?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, with Stage 9 taking place today, and the race continuing through the Pyrenees and Alps until July 26.

angles.name: Mountain Stages
angles.copy: The Tour de France is deep into its thrilling stages, with today's Stage 9 bringing more hilly challenges. Who's making their move for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: Pedal to the metal! The Tour de France continues to deliver incredible cycling action across France. Catch up on all the highlights!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A prolonged heatwave continues across much of England and Wales, with temperatures expected to remain above 30°C and heat health alerts in place until at least next week.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Another scorching day for many across the UK! Stay safe and hydrated in the heat, especially as temperatures remain above 30°C. #HeatwaveUK

angles.name: Devon Heat
angles.copy: Yelverton in Devon hit 33°C yesterday, and the heatwave continues! Remember to look out for vulnerable neighbours and pets. #DevonHeat

angles.name: Wales & England Heat
angles.copy: High temperatures are set to continue across Wales and England for days. Make sure you're taking precautions against the heat! #WalesHeat

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Series 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with new episodes Sunday-Friday at 9 PM and 'Unseen Bits' on Saturdays.

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: What drama will unfold in the villa tonight? Love Island UK is back at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX! Who's your favourite couple?

angles.name: Mid-Series Mayhem
angles.copy: We're deep into Series 13 of Love Island and the twists keep coming! What's been the biggest shocker so far?

angles.name: Unseen Bits
angles.copy: Did you catch all the 'Unseen Bits' from the Love Island villa last night? Always a good laugh!

moments.title: Roger McGuinn Turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, legendary frontman of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow, July 13.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Roger
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the iconic voice and jangle guitar of The Byrds, Roger McGuinn, turns 84! What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to the one and only Roger McGuinn of The Byrds tomorrow! A true pioneer of folk-rock.

moments.title: Leon Bridges Turns 37
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning soul and R&B artist Leon Bridges celebrates his 37th birthday tomorrow, July 13.

angles.name: Birthday Soul
angles.copy: Happy 37th birthday wishes to the incredible Leon Bridges tomorrow! His soulful sound always hits different. What's your top track?

angles.name: Modern Crooner
angles.copy: Celebrating the smooth vocals of Leon Bridges, who turns 37 tomorrow! An artist bringing classic soul to a new generation.

moments.title: Joe Satriani Turns 70
moments.blurb: Legendary instrumental rock guitarist Joe Satriani will celebrate his 70th birthday on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Guitar Virtuoso
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the incredible guitar virtuoso Joe Satriani this Wednesday! His influence on rock music is immense. What's your favourite Satch album?

angles.name: Satch's Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating 70 years of shredding! Joe Satriani, one of the greatest instrumental rock guitarists, hits a milestone birthday on Wednesday. Tune in for some of his best!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: Iconic singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Vocal Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! Her voice defined an era. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: Happy 80th
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt's incredible career spans decades. Join us in celebrating her 80th birthday on Wednesday!

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the influential DJ and producer, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Eat, Sleep, Rave, Repeat! Happy 63rd birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim on Thursday. What's your go-to track from the Big Beat legend?

angles.name: Iconic DJ
angles.copy: Celebrating Norman Cook, aka Fatboy Slim, who turns 63 this Thursday! His tracks defined dance floors in the 90s and 00s. #NormanCook

moments.title: Luke Bryan Turns 50
moments.blurb: Country music superstar and American Idol judge Luke Bryan celebrates his 50th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Country Star's 50th
angles.copy: Half a century of country hits! Happy 50th birthday to the fantastic Luke Bryan this Friday. What's your favourite song from him?

angles.name: Idol Judge
angles.copy: Wishing a big happy 50th to Luke Bryan on Friday! From the stage to the American Idol judging panel, he's a true entertainer. #CountryMusic

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Sabbath Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler, the iconic bassist of Black Sabbath, this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

angles.name: Heavy Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating a true pioneer of heavy metal! Geezer Butler turns 77 on Friday. His lyrics and basslines laid the foundation for a genre. #BlackSabbath

moments.title: England & Wales School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Most schools in England and Wales begin their summer holidays from next week, generally between July 18 and July 25.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is almost over! Most schools in England and Wales break up for summer holidays next week. What are your plans?

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: Summer holidays are just around the corner for pupils across Wales! Wishing everyone a fantastic and well-deserved break starting next week.

angles.name: Devon Break Up
angles.copy: Schools across Devon are preparing to break up for the summer holidays next week! Time for some fun in the sun (hopefully!). #DevonSchools
